title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Mindspace Business Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Mindspace Business Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
